news.headline: Farmland Partners Inc. completes $289 million farmland sale comprising 46 farms with 41,554 acres across multiple states.
news.summary: Farmland Partners Inc. (NYSE: FPI) has officially closed the sale of a portfolio of farmland to Farmland Reserve, Inc. The transaction, which took place on October 16, 2024, included 46 farms totaling 41,554 acres across several states - Arkansas, Florida, Louisiana, Mississippi, Nebraska, Oklahoma, and the Carolinas. The deal, valued at $289 million, was an all-cash agreement.

news.headline: Domino's partners with St. Jude Children's Research Hospital, offers customers chance to donate during checkout. #Charity #pizza.
news.summary: In ANN ARBOR, Mich., on Oct. 21, 2024, Domino's Pizza Inc. (NYSE: DPZ), the leading global pizza company, announced that customers will have the option to donate or round up their bill in support of the St. Jude Thanks and Giving® campaign. This initiative will run during the upcoming season of giving. Domino's Pizza Inc. is the largest pizza company globally and operates through its franchise.

news.headline: Kirkland's partners with Bed Bath & Beyond for neighborhood store strategy, investing $25 million for growth.
news.summary: A strategic partnership has been formed between Kirkland's Home and Beyond, Inc. aiming to enhance sustainable profitable growth by leveraging the core strengths of both companies. Beyond plans to invest $25 million through a combination of debt and equity transactions to bolster Kirkland's capital position and support its growth strategies.

news.headline: Onity Group plans to offer $475 million in Senior Notes due 2029 through Escrow Issuer, a PHH Corporation subsidiary.
news.summary: West Palm Beach, Florida, October 21, 2024 - Onity Group Inc. (NYSE: ONIT), a top non-bank mortgage servicer and originator, disclosed that its subsidiary PHH Escrow Issuer LLC is gearing up to launch $475 million in Senior Notes due 2029. The offering is contingent on various factors including market circumstances.

news.headline: WiSA Technologies to participate in upcoming investor conferences; details and locations to be shared in the coming weeks.
news.summary: WiSA Technologies, based in Beaverton, Oregon, has disclosed that its management team will be engaging in investor events in the upcoming weeks. This is a notable development for WiSA Technologies, which specializes in wireless audio technology solutions. The exact dates and details of these events have not been specified in the announcement. This move signifies an effort by WiSA Technologies to engage with investors and potentially attract new interest in the company. Investors and industry experts will be watching closely to see how these events impact WiSA Technologies and its stock symbol, WISA.

news.headline: Top UK mobile app dev company Hyperlink InfoSystem dominates global market. UK boasts talented developers and flourishing tech industry.
news.summary: In London and New York on October 21, 2024, it was reported that the United Kingdom is becoming a major contender in the global app development industry. The country boasts a significant number of skilled developers, a strong emphasis on innovation, and a flourishing tech community. This has led to a surge in app development activities, with a notable increase in the number of new apps being created.

news.headline: GES to be acquired by Truelink Capital, a private equity firm based in LA, for accelerated growth. (Total characters: 97)
news.summary: Today, on October 21, 2024, GES, a top player in the global exhibition and event sector, revealed that its parent company, Viad Corp, along with Truelink Capital, a private equity company from Los Angeles, have engaged in a strategic transaction. This move is anticipated to fuel GES's growth and development at an accelerated pace.

news.headline: Cyngn's DriveMod Forklift completes first paid deployment at customer site, key step in commercialization.
news.summary: Cyngn, based in Menlo Park, California, shared news on Oct. 21, 2024, about the successful completion of the inaugural paid autonomous deployment of its DriveMod Forklift at a customer site. This accomplishment signifies a significant advancement in the journey towards commercializing Cyngn's latest vehicle for Enterprise use.

news.headline: Senior Venture Partner Dr. Ernest Mario passed away; joined Pappas Capital in 2002. Sad loss for the firm.
news.summary: In a statement released on October 21, 2024, Research Triangle Park, N.C.-based Pappas Capital expressed profound sorrow at the loss of Senior Venture Partner Dr. Ernest Mario. Dr. Mario, who had been a part of the firm's Scientific Advisory Board since 2002, transitioned to the role of Senior Venture Partner during his tenure. His passing was met with deep sadness by all involved in the organization.

news.headline: Positive results presented for Phase II study of ABBV-RGX-314 at AAO 2024, showing 97% reduction in treatment burden and no cases of intraocular inflammation.
news.summary: After receiving treatment with ABBV-RGX-314, there was a significant 97% decrease in treatment burden observed at the nine-month mark. The data indicated that the treatment had a favorable safety and efficacy profile, with results aligning with findings from various previous studies. Additionally, there were zero instances of intraocular inflammation reported, indicating that the treatment was well tolerated. This outcome occurred without the use of prophylactic measures.

news.headline: Kraig Labs (OTCQB: KBLB) to host webinar on spider silk technology commercialization progress.
news.summary: Kraig Labs, trading as KBLB on the OTCQB market, is set to hold an investor webinar focusing on the advancement of its spider silk technology commercialization process.

news.headline: Global PET MRI market to reach $494.7 million by 2034 with 9.1% CAGR growth. North America to hold 8% market share in 2024. East Asia market to hit $91 million by 2034. United States to hold 9% market share in North America. Clinical PET MRI systems to reach $426.6 million by 2034. South Korea market to expand at 2% CAGR.
news.summary: The global PET MRI market is expected to reach US$ 206.3 million by 2024 and climb to US$ 494.7 million by 2034. The demand for PET MRI systems is being driven by their increasing utilization in various healthcare fields like neurology, cardiology, oncology, and musculoskeletal imaging. These systems allow medical professionals to analyze diseases in depth, aiding in early detection, precise staging, and treatment planning. The combination of PET and MRI technology provides high-end insights into disease processes and treatment responses by allowing simultaneous viewing of anatomical, functional, and molecular data. The market is projected to expand at a 1% CAGR from 2024 to 2034, with North America expected to hold 8% market share in 2024. East Asia's market is forecasted to reach US$ 91 million by 2034, up from US$ 31 million in 2024. The United States is set to hold 9% market share in the North American region by 2024. Clinical PET MRI systems are projected to reach a market value of US$ 426.6 million by 2034. South Korea's market is forecasted to expand at a 2% CAGR through 2034.

news.headline: HBT Financial, Inc. reports Q3 2024 financial results.
Brondell introduces Nebia Yuba collection - Up to 40% water savings, 75% more force. Leading sustainable showers.
news.summary: Brondell, a prominent sustainable kitchen and bathroom products company in North America, has launched the new Nebia shower system in San Francisco on October 21, 2024. This innovative product by Yuba offers up to 40% increased water savings and delivers a 75% stronger water force compared to traditional showers. The advanced technology aims at making high-performance, water-saving showers more accessible to the mainstream market.

news.headline: CEO Warrior at Service Business Live event in Houston offers contractors tailor-made 90-day business plan, aiming to push them to new heights.
news.summary: A leading worldwide organization specializing in business training, coaching, and implementation is propelling contractors to greater success through personalized 90-day business plans. Based in Eatontown, N.J., CEO Warrior is at the forefront of this initiative, motivating contractors to achieve new heights within a specific timeframe.

news.headline: The New Flat Rate shares winning strategies for contractors at 2024 Business Uncensored with actionable advice. #DALTON #PRNewswire
news.summary: A renowned software company that specializes in generating prices has offered valuable advice to contractors in the home service industry. Based in Dalton, Georgia, The New Flat Rate, known as the top software for home service contractors, recently shared insights on current challenges. This award-winning company is committed to assisting professionals in the industry. The news was released on October 21, 2024, via PRNewswire.

news.headline: Mercedes-Benz opens Europe's first battery recycling plant, first car manufacturer to close loop, in Kuppenheim, Germany.
news.summary: In Kuppenheim, Germany, Mercedes-Benz has inaugurated Europe's inaugural battery recycling facility, showcasing an innovative mechanical-hydrometallurgical process. This development positions Mercedes-Benz as the world's premier car manufacturer to establish a closed-loop battery recycling system within its own premises. The state-of-the-art facility in Kuppenheim, Southern Germany exemplifies a true circular economy model. This initiative highlights Mercedes-Benz's commitment to reducing consumption and cementing its reputation for pioneering spirit and innovation in the automotive sector.

news.headline: US stocks set for mixed open as investors await earnings from Tesla, Boeing, GM. 1/5 of S&P 500 companies set to report earnings. 79% of those reported exceeded Street expectations. Nasdaq -0.23%, S&P -0.08%, Dow Jones 0.03%. Cumulative earnings of S&P 500 set to rise for fifth straight quarter. Despite Middle East tensions, energy sector worst-performing last week.
news.summary: U.S. stocks are set for a mixed start on Monday after six weeks of consecutive gains. Companies like Tesla, Boeing, and General Motors are expected to post their earnings this week. FactSet mentioned that earnings of S&P 500 companies are forecasted to increase for the fifth straight quarter, with 79% of reported companies surpassing Street expectations. Over 100 S&P 500 companies are set to report earnings this week, with focus also on the housing market. In premarket trading, the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust fell 0.21% to $583.38, and the Invesco QQQ ETF declined 0.38% to $492.60. Last week, despite tensions in the Middle East, Energy was the worst-performing sector due to various factors, including slower economic growth in China and increased U.S. oil production causing over an 8% drop in WTI crude prices.

news.headline: ACCO Brands Corp (NYSE: ACCO) to release third quarter 2024 earnings on Oct 31; webcast on Nov 1 at 8:30am EDT.
news.summary: ACCO Brands Corporation (NYSE: ACCO) revealed it will unveil its Q3 2024 earnings on October 31, 2024, post-market closure. The subsequent discussion on the results is scheduled for November 1 at 8:30 a.m. EDT through a conference call and webcast. Interested parties can access the webcast via the Investor Relations segment on www.accobrands.com, with the option of replay later. ACCO Brands Corporation, known for harboring renowned brands, aims to provide insights regarding its financial standing.

news.headline: Silver Storm Mining Ltd. faces cease trade order due to failure to file annual financial statements; trading on OTC Pink Market.
news.summary: In Toronto, Silver Storm Mining Ltd. (TSX.V: SVRS | OTC Pink: SVRSF | FSE: SVR) has received a cease trade order (CTO) from the British Columbia Securities Commission (BCSC) due to its failure to submit annual financial statements, management's discussion and analysis, and officer certifications for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2024. The CTO restricts trading activities until the required documents are filed. Silver Storm is the subject of this action as the BCSC's primary regulator.

news.headline: BioCryst (Nasdaq: BCRX) to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 4. Located in North Carolina.
news.summary: BioCryst Pharmaceuticals, Inc., based in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, disclosed on October 21, 2024, that they plan to release their financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Monday, November 4, 2024. The company, listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol BCRX, will provide insights into its performance during this period. This update signifies a crucial disclosure for shareholders and market analysts alike.

news.headline: Union at Boeing reaches new labor agreement, bringing an end to disagreements over pay and benefits.
Coinbase CEO backs John Deaton over Elizabeth Warren in Senate race w/ support from Elon Musk. Warren accused of colluding with SEC.
news.summary: Tech billionaire Elon Musk recently expressed his support for John Deaton, a strong advocate for cryptocurrencies who is competing against Senator Elizabeth Warren for the Massachusetts Senate seat. The endorsement came after Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong urged Massachusetts residents to vote for Deaton, criticizing Warren for her anti-cryptocurrency stance. Armstrong accused Warren of collaborating with SEC Chair Gary Gensler to stifle the cryptocurrency industry in the U.S., describing her as against freedom and in favor of government control over financial services. Musk validated his support for Deaton by resharing Armstrong's message with a concise "Yes" caption. This development highlights the increasing influence of prominent figures in the debate surrounding cryptocurrency regulation.

news.headline: Sherritt gives operational update after countrywide power outage in Cuba on Oct 18, partial restoration on Oct 19, no impact on 2024 guidance anticipated.
news.summary: Sherritt International Corporation, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as TSX:S, issued an operational update post a nationwide power outage in Cuba starting October 18th. Partial power restoration took place on October 19th, while work towards full grid recovery is ongoing. The Corporation expects no disruption to its 2024 projections. Among its divisions, the Moa Nickel mine is also affected by the outage.

news.headline: Augurex partners with ARUP Labs to offer 14-3-3η (eta) test for RA diagnosis, enhancing early detection and management.
news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada, Augurex Life Sciences Corp. has revealed that ARUP Laboratories in the U.S. has introduced the 14-3-3η test to their diagnostic testing lineup. This test aims to improve the identification and treatment of rheumatoid arthritis (RA) patients. The collaboration is anticipated to have a substantial impact on early RA detection and management, offering clinicians a valuable resource to enhance patient care.

news.headline: Northpoint Charter School partners with Varsity Tutors for Schools to offer free tutoring resources to students until 2030.
news.summary: Albuquerque-based Northpoint Charter School has revealed a new collaboration with Varsity Tutors for Schools, a subsidiary of Nerdy (NYSE: NRDY), the prominent online tutoring platform. This partnership will grant all students free access to the Varsity Tutors for Schools platform. The initiative will run until June 30, 2030, providing comprehensive academic resources to students, educators, and families for the upcoming school years.

news.headline: Laser Photonics had a successful booth at FabTech 2024, generating 137 new leads from various industries.
news.summary: Laser Photonics Corporation (NASDAQ: LASE), a prominent global industrial developer of laser systems, is pleased to report a successful participation at the FABTECH 2024 tradeshow in Orlando, Florida. Held from October 15 to 17, the event proved to be fruitful, with Laser Photonics garnering 137 promising leads. These leads were generated from various professionals, including fabricators, metal formers, welding managers, finishing managers, and business owners across different industries.

news.headline: Qnovia CEO advocates for inhalation-based nicotine therapy at FDA & NIH meeting to improve smoking cessation options.
news.summary: A recent speech emphasized the importance of inhalation-based prescription nicotine replacement therapy as a solution to the inefficiencies of current treatment options. The CEO of Qnovia, Inc. addressed the FDA and NIH at a joint agency public event in Richmond, Virginia on October 21, 2024. This highlights the urgency for better treatment methods to tackle nicotine addiction issues.

news.headline: Largo boosts V2O5 production by 42% to 3,072 tonnes in Q3 2024, agreeing to supply 2,100 tonnes for $23.5M.
news.summary: In Toronto, Largo has reported a 42% increase in V2O5 production, reaching 3,072 tonnes in the third quarter of 2024. Additionally, they have signed a binding agreement to supply 2,100 tonnes of V2O5 for $23.5 million.

news.headline: Aescape debuts robot massage at R+R Wellness at Grand Hyatt Nashville, first partnership in city, catering to personalized wellness.
news.summary: Aescape, a leading provider of automated AI massage for personalized recovery, has unveiled its partnership with R+R Wellness at the Grand Hyatt Nashville. This strategic move marks Aescape's debut in the hospitality sector in Nashville, addressing the rising need for tailored wellness offerings as the company expands. "In response to evolving traveler trends, there is a growing interest in personalized services and unique wellness experiences," stated Kelly Bannon, Spa Di. This collaboration signifies a significant step for Aescape as it aims to cater to the increasing demand for customizable solutions in the industry.

news.headline: U Power and Ualabee collaborate to introduce battery-swapping solutions to South America's ride-hailing market, aiming to revolutionize the industry.
news.summary: A new strategic partnership in South America aims to transform the ride-hailing industry. U Power Limited, listed on Nasdaq as UCAR, is leading the initiative. The company, known for its vehicle sourcing services, envisions becoming a comprehensive provider of electric EV battery solutions. The partnership is projected to bring significant changes to the region's transportation sector. The agreement was announced in Shanghai on October 21, 2024, signaling a major move that could revolutionize the ride-hailing industry in South America.

news.headline: Energy Recovery, Inc. (ERII) to hold live investor webinar on Nov 18, 2024, from 10am-12pm EST with CEO, CFO, and VP's presenting.
news.summary: In San Leandro, California, Energy Recovery, Inc. (NASDAQ: ERII) will conduct an investor webinar on November 18th, 2024, from 10 a.m. to approximately noon Eastern Time to outline its strategic vision. The event will feature CEO David Moon, CFO Mike Mancini, Sr. VP of Water Rodney Clemente, and VP of CO2 Ricardo Freitas delivering presentations. Following these talks, there will be a live Q&A session for analysts and investors.

news.headline: SuperCom to present at LD Micro Invitational XIII. CEO to give corporate update. Oct. 21, 2024. (NASDAQ: SPCB).
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel on October 21, 2024, SuperCom, a leading global company offering secure solutions for e-Government, IoT, and Cybersecurity industries, revealed that its President and CEO, Ordan Trabelsi, will conduct a corporate summary and engage in individual meetings. Trabelsi is set to give insight into the company's operations, with a focus on its initiatives in various sectors including e-Government, IoT, and Cybersecurity. The company is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SPCB.

news.headline: Best Buy announces holiday shopping calendar, Black Friday savings starting Nov. 8. Weekly doorbusters with top tech deals.
news.summary: Get ready to mark your calendars and save big with Best Buy's holiday shopping lineup announcement. The retailer is kicking off with Black Friday deals on Nov. 8, and then every Friday, customers can expect new doorbusters featuring top tech deals. Those looking to start their holiday shopping early can explore Best Buy's Holiday Gift Center for gift ideas. Don't miss out on the chance to snag some of the hottest deals of the season!

news.headline: SES AI will release 2024 Q3 financial results on Oct 31, 2024, focuses on Li-Metal cells for EVs, UAM, and drones.
news.summary: SES AI Corporation, a renowned manufacturer of high-performance Li-Metal batteries, declared that its 2024 third quarter financial results will be disclosed post-market hours on October 31, 2024. Following this announcement, the company is set to conduct a conference call on the same day at 5:00 p.m. ET. During the call, SES AI will showcase its advancements in Li-Metal cells for electric vehicles, urban air mobility, and drones. SES AI is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol SES.

news.headline: SymphonyAI launches new AI feature on Revedia for media orgs to analyze content performance, serving 300+ clients.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, SymphonyAI, a prominent provider of predictive and generative AI SaaS solutions for businesses, has unveiled enhanced AI capabilities on the Revedia platform. This new functionality is designed to help media companies better analyze the performance of FAST, AVOD, and TVOD content. SymphonyAI's media sector has assisted over 300 clients in the media industry by providing valuable insights through the Revedia platform and a range of data-centric revenue enhancement tools. The Media Copilot feature enables quick retrieval of information.

news.headline: Acurx presents data on Ibezapolstat's gut bile acid profile at IDWeek. Shows anti-recurrence effect in CDI patients.
news.summary: The information provided suggests that patients with C. difficile Infection (CDI) who received ibezapostat showed a positive gut bile acid profile, potentially contributing to the drug's anti-recurrence benefits. Treatment with ibezapostat in CDI patients led to the restoration of beneficial bacteria. This underscores the potential of ibezapostat in managing CDI, highlighting its positive impact on gut health.

news.headline: Denodo introduces Agora, cloud service, transforming data management globally.
news.summary: Denodo, a company based in Palo Alto, California, has recently released Agora, which is being hailed as the Denodo Cloud Service. This new service is set to transform data management practices for organizations on a global scale. This development marks a significant step forward in the field, promising to revolutionize how businesses handle their data needs.

news.headline: Graphite One secures exclusive access to anode manufacturing technology for US Ohio facility, key step in industry progress.
news.summary: The recent execution of the agreements between Graphite One and Chenyu signifies a significant advancement in laying the groundwork for the establishment of a U.S. Anode Active Material ("AAM") manufacturing facility in Ohio. A leading AAM manufacturer has granted an exclusive license for the North American market to Graphite One. This move by Graphite One sets the stage for the development of their planned AAM facility in Ohio.

news.headline: monday.com to announce Q3 2024 financial results on 11 Nov 2024, with conference call at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: In a press release from New York and Tel Aviv, Israel, monday.com (NASDAQ: MNDY), the all-in-one work platform, declared it will disclose its Q3 2024 financial figures on Monday, November 11, 2024. The management team of monday.com is set to conduct a conference call and webcast to analyze the results at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. Details regarding the financial outcomes of monday.com, along with the webcast link for the conference call, will be publicized.

news.headline: Keeper Security emphasizes importance of software updates during Cybersecurity Action Month. #cybersecurity #updates (Word count: 20)
news.summary: In Chicago on October 21, 2024, Keeper Security is encouraging consumers and businesses to participate in Cybersecurity Action Month by highlighting the importance of prioritizing regular software updates. They recommend enabling automatic updates to enhance cybersecurity measures. This initiative aims to raise awareness about cybersecurity practices.

news.headline: Metalla reports portfolio updates. Stock tickers: TSXV: MTA, NYSE AMERICAN: MTA. Highlighting Gosselin project.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on October 21, 2024, Metalla Royalty & Streaming Ltd. shared updates on its portfolio. The company, listed on TSXV as MTA and NYSE American as MTA, disclosed updates on the Gosselin project.

news.headline: Find Therapeutics starts Phase 1 clinical study of FTX-101; first subject dosed, focusing on autoimmune diseases.
news.summary: In Montreal on October 21, 2024, Find Therapeutics Inc., a biopharmaceutical company in the clinical stage, revealed the commencement of dosing in its Phase 1 clinical trial of FTX-101 in healthy volunteers. FTX-101 is one of their innovative therapies tailored for autoimmune diseases.

news.headline: Globe Life Inc. to release Third Quarter 2024 earnings on October 23, 2024, after the market closes. #GL #finance
news.summary: In McKinney, Texas, on October 21, 2024, it was announced that Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) is set to unveil its financial results for the Third Quarter of 2024 after the market closes on Wednesday, October 23, 2024. The earnings report, along with supplementary financial information, will be made available to the public at that time.

news.headline: VLAS appointed as sole maritime administrator of Vanuatu International Shipping Registry, boosting efficiency and support for ship owners globally.
news.summary: VLAS has been appointed as the exclusive maritime administrator of the Vanuatu International Shipping Registry following a collaboration with the Vanuatu Government. The partnership was declared on October 21, 2024, in New York. This agreement aims to enhance efficiency and provide better support to ship owners globally.

news.headline: New Flyer, a subsidiary of NFI, secures its largest hydrogen fuel cell-electric bus contract, 108 buses for SamTrans.
news.summary: In St. Cloud, Minnesota, on October 21, 2024, NFI Group Inc. (NFI) disclosed a significant development. The leading independent bus and coach manufacturer, along with its subsidiary New Flyer of America Inc. (New Flyer), announced securing a notable order. San Mateo County Transit (SamTrans) has placed a firm order for 108 Xcelsior CHARGE FC™ 40-foot transit buses, which are zero-emission hydrogen fuel cell-electric vehicles. This order stands as the largest single fuel cell bus order in New Flyer’s history. The agreement for these buses was appended to New Flyer’s backlog in the second quarter of 2024, with confirmed orders scheduled over the following two quarters.

news.headline: T-Mobile partners with Siyata to provide new mission-critical 5G radios for first responders. Important stats: Siyata Mobile Inc. (Nasdaq: SYTA/SYTAW), SD7 Ultra series.
news.summary: In Boston on October 21, 2024, Siyata Mobile Inc. (Nasdaq: SYTA/SYTAW) unveiled its latest product, the SD7 Ultra series 5G MCPTT cellular device. Siyata, known for its PoC devices, introduced this next-generation technology for mission-critical communication.

news.headline: Prospect Capital upsizes preferred stock offering to $2.25 billion due to high demand from various channels.
news.summary: Today, Prospect Capital Corporation revealed an increase in their preferred stock offering with Preferred Capital Securities (PCS) due to high demand from various channels. The offering, which initially closed in the quarter ending December 31, 2020, has garnered significant attention from private wealth, institutional, and Registered Investment Advisor sectors. There has been a total of $1.8 billion in aggregate liquidation preference issuances recorded.

news.headline: Cobra Acquisitions LLC, a Mammoth Energy Services subsidiary, received $18.4 million from PREPA, Puerto Rico Electric Power Authority.
news.summary: In Oklahoma City on October 21, 2024, Cobra Acquisitions LLC, a subsidiary of Mammoth Energy Services, Inc., shared they have received $18.4 million from the Puerto Rico Electric Power Authority.

news.headline: ISS advises backing Territorial/Hope Bancorp merger.
